# zabbix_action_trigger (Data Source)

Looks up a Zabbix trigger action by `id` or `name`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a trigger action by name.
data "zabbix_action_trigger" "by_name" {
  name = "Notify administrators"
}

# Look up a trigger action by ID.
data "zabbix_action_trigger" "by_id" {
  id = "12"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) ID of the trigger action. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Name of the trigger action. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `escalation_period` (String) Default escalation period.
- `filter` (Attributes) Conditions that must be matched for the action to fire. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--filter))
- `notify_if_canceled` (Boolean) Whether recovery notifications are sent for problems canceled during maintenance.
- `operations` (Attributes List) Problem escalation operations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations))
- `pause_suppressed` (Boolean) Whether operations are paused while hosts are in a maintenance period.
- `recovery_operations` (Attributes List) Recovery operations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--recovery_operations))
- `status` (String) Status of the trigger action. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`.
- `update_operations` (Attributes List) Update/acknowledge operations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--update_operations))

<a id="nestedatt--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter`

Read-Only:

- `condition` (Attributes List) Filter conditions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--filter--condition))
- `evaluation_type` (String) How conditions are evaluated. One of: `and_or`, `and`, `or`, `custom_expression`.
- `formula` (String) Custom expression joining condition labels.

<a id="nestedatt--filter--condition"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filter.condition`

Read-Only:

- `condition_type` (String) Type of condition.
- `label` (String) Condition label used in custom expression formulas (e.g. `A`, `B`).
- `operator` (String) Comparison operator.
- `value` (String) Value to compare against.
- `value2` (String) Secondary value (used by some condition types).



<a id="nestedatt--operations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations`

Read-Only:

- `escalation_period` (String) Escalation period override for this operation step.
- `escalation_step_from` (Number) First escalation step this operation applies to.
- `escalation_step_to` (Number) Last escalation step this operation applies to (0 = last step).
- `remote_command` (Attributes) Execute a remote command. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations--remote_command))
- `send_message` (Attributes) Send a notification message. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations--send_message))

<a id="nestedatt--operations--remote_command"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command`

Read-Only:

- `current_host` (Boolean) Run the command on the host that triggered the event.
- `custom_script` (Attributes) Execute a custom script. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations--remote_command--custom_script))
- `global_script` (Attributes) Run a Zabbix global script. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations--remote_command--global_script))
- `host_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of host group IDs to run the command on.
- `host_ids` (Set of String) Set of host IDs to run the command on.
- `ipmi` (Attributes) Execute an IPMI command. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations--remote_command--ipmi))
- `ssh` (Attributes) Execute a command over SSH. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations--remote_command--ssh))
- `telnet` (Attributes) Execute a command over Telnet. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--operations--remote_command--telnet))

<a id="nestedatt--operations--remote_command--custom_script"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.custom_script`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) Script body to execute.
- `execute_on` (String) Where to execute the script. One of: `agent`, `server_or_proxy`, `server`.


<a id="nestedatt--operations--remote_command--global_script"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.global_script`

Read-Only:

- `script_id` (String) ID of the Zabbix global script to run.


<a id="nestedatt--operations--remote_command--ipmi"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.ipmi`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) IPMI command to execute.


<a id="nestedatt--operations--remote_command--ssh"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.ssh`

Read-Only:

- `authtype` (String) Authentication type. One of: `password`, `public_key`.
- `command` (String) Command to execute over SSH.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) SSH password (used when `authtype = "password"`).
- `port` (String) SSH port.
- `private_key` (String, Sensitive) Private key for SSH authentication (used when `authtype = "public_key"`).
- `public_key` (String) Public key for SSH authentication (used when `authtype = "public_key"`).
- `username` (String) SSH username.


<a id="nestedatt--operations--remote_command--telnet"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.remote_command.telnet`

Read-Only:

- `command` (String) Command to execute over Telnet.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Telnet password.
- `port` (String) Telnet port.
- `username` (String) Telnet username.



<a id="nestedatt--operations--send_message"></a>
### Nested Schema for `operations.send_message`

Read-Only:

- `media_type_id` (String) ID of the media type to use.
- `message` (String) Custom message body.
- `subject` (String) Custom message subject.
- `use_default_message` (Boolean) Whether the media type's default subject/message are used.
- `user_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of user group IDs to send the message to.
- `user_ids` (Set of String) Set of user IDs to send the message to.



<a id="nestedatt--recovery_operations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `recovery_operations`

Read-Only:

- `notify_all_involved` (Boolean) Notify all users who received the problem notification.
- `remote_command` (Attributes) Execute a remote command. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--recovery_operations--remote_command))
- `send_message` (Attributes) Send a notification message. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--recovery_operations--send_message))
